title: Marisol Cove boutique-hotel homepage hero: license widescreen stock, crop desktop + mobile banners, grade to warm coastal look, place vectorized logo, InDesign export to web JPEG/PNG + print PDF
one_line_ask: License a large widescreen coastal stock photo, crop it into desktop and mobile homepage hero frames, grade both to a warm coastal look, place the client's vectorized Marisol Cove logo, and export web-ready JPEG/PNG banners plus a print-ready PDF proof from the client's authored InDesign banner template.

issues: Checkerboard pattern visible in background indicates transparency is correctly implemented but the background is not fully clean white/solid — acceptable as transparent PNG source
Wave glyph is slightly small relative to the text width but within acceptable compositional range
Very slight luminance banding/noise in the background checkerboard area — designer fix

assets.name: marisol_hero_template.indd
assets.note: Client-provided .indd template; represented here as an authored text proxy (binary Adobe format not synthesizable).
